description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms extended horizontally to the sides. She is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeve top and tight pants, both of which appear to be made from synthetic or stretch fabric, giving a sleek and modern urban look. The figure wears knee-high boots with a slight heel, adding to the contemporary style. Her hair is cut in a chin-length bob, straight and slightly layered, framing her face. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle anatomical details. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a streamlined silhouette suitable for city environments.
description: A modern adult female pedestrian in fitted urban clothing and knee-high boots, standing with arms outstretched. She has a chin-length bob hairstyle and a sleek, streamlined appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fitted top, pants, and boots, with arms extended and the face and hairstyle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the contour of the body, and the side profile of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the fit of the clothing, and the back of the boots, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the body profile, arm, and boot details from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted short-sleeve top and tight pants with knee-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
